data.content: Implemented conditional post-upgrade hint suppression by threading cwd into the self-manage upgrade path and hiding the kno doctor hint only when the current repo resolves to a git root whose hooks check passes. Added regression coverage for current hooks, missing hooks, stale hooks, and non-repo contexts. Validation: cargo test maybe_run_self_command; cargo test upgrade_summary_omits_hint_when_not_needed; cargo test upgrade_hint_needed_stays_enabled_outside_git_repo; make sanity (95.05% coverage). make install-hooks had to be run from /Users/cartine/knots because the installer assumes .git/hooks is a directory in a non-worktree repo.
